textByHash.7bfbd21ca0df9c93e4477d110c249966b21d9f9a: Good day to you too, Blockhead.
textByHash.9471698b5e8ccb5d129aefe036eb87aaeed1e3c1: Now what do you want? A hex? A spot potion? Power, beauty, eternal youth, etcetera?
textByHash.5bf0f66a6f503b9102630cac31bdafdd8dbcaa46: Ahh, I see. But I warn you, stranger - extinguishing the flame of life is simple, but people rarely wish to face the consequences, and I doubt you are any different.
textByHash.301748777578cbee0c8f968c0f02facfb27c5ca5: Well now this is getting interesting. I'd recommend a poisoning. Who do you wish dead? I need to know so that I may tailor a poison to their specific needs.
textByHash.00966be4ba032e4194c5158109a1389f7686d25c: Traitorous Ali? Say no more! That wretch traded his grandmother's house for a jar of pickled aubergines! I believe he'll be easily gotten rid of...
textByHash.0c96fa728ba3d4bec8677bd9b718228fdb06ba43: None at all - I will extract much pleasure from his passing. Just bring me the ingredients I require.
textByHash.83f4fdc9af1c63ce03d7f7b6a3acfb2e70e228cf: Ah, impatience! Traitorous Ali's time is indeed nigh. Firstly bring me some snake venom, which will act as the main toxin.
textByHash.9d99649cc4c5a95c58ffda98ee2f593d2d511297: Sheesh! You'd make a terrible hag. Just bring me a snake with teeth in its head - and don't even think of giving me that snake charmer's pet worm, it's about as dangerous as a rubber knife.
textByHash.d7551ae56884058b14a9113c271d242a12f4973e: Have you got a snake yet?
textByHash.42574a0f7de06135642024ce5f5a9c4d8911a521: Well don't bother me again until you do!
textByHash.71decf0f2ab4041a9c0ddefb89913de57424b523: Ah yes, that snake will do nicely. Hello, you wriggly little cutie!
textByHash.11345b05104716e5523a5809fd74572c7cbd894f: Who's a vindictive little beast? You are! You are!
textByHash.40ef459a6e38ec5723056cfbf0ec028a3a2ac6d7: Now that I have the toxin I need something to hide its trace. Fresh camel dung should do the job.
textByHash.18c097ad64a3c5bfe8398f268112f956d4ff3d21: Do you want the poison or not?
textByHash.87c59de54b0f91117cc5b94c2bf19b4f372c096c: And make that fresh camel dung! Nice and stinky. Now hand over that venomous little darling before it takes a bite out of you.
textByHash.f6e628950406d13b59f9ae8ac8ad4b19b787cddc: Do you have the camel dung yet?
textByHash.d7d0e4bfb87157ef7c4de0740f4506b24167c60d: Well don't come back until you have it!
textByHash.d6f4ab4ef4fed5803d77bfb0414d161a3f9d76d7: Actually I already had it brewing. I just needed the ingredients for another batch.
textByHash.6a89ffaa66890ad42d57403afaeccd1f52294fb2: You wouldn't believe the demand. It's been murder!
textByHash.77849b2b25c2f9a94e12f8d5b9d0101a42e82d30: Sorry, I've been dying to say that for ages.
textByHash.14fca56c86263c4fce932298dd4f424be7d5b1e6: Wait! Just remember, this poison isn't designed to be used on a weapon. In fact it's not a contact poison at all. You'll have to do more than just smear it on a blade!
textByHash.f9a4febe7ef6b4788b935a9124c0689b22751db2: Why? Was the first batch not good enough?
textByHash.36ec473ee332339f06e47d6fc1af7ebe77638a3d: Well if that's the case, no! I have better things to be doing than continuously brewing poisons for people who have no use for it.
textByHash.37bbff73785419f80c3fa059907d11c3a4acf8e8: What? How do you just lose a batch of the most potent poison in all of Gielinor? It's even more deadly than the jungle karambwan.
textByHash.7afd1e7f7e9fee3188d35e8c87e4a24016438456: Well alright, I'll give you another batch this once.
textByHash.6ed21064a7c9036faa5cdc394f1a63cfd29a76f8: Have you good reason to disturb me again?
textByHash.894cb89c98a7efb7c358d318f65870eb6cfe3cf9: I warned you about needlessly bothering me. That's it! I'm turning you into a frog!
textByHash.8aac24ffcd1b14317ef84ae96e883c94a078885f: Don't taunt me, fool! Once I find a spare minute you'll be ribbiting on the other side of your face, you mark my words!
textByHash.fc46e469dcad3f59acaf90a63aa99f3ac9160a8a: Old hag indeed! I have a name you know!
textByHash.5f19c658552907db792ccccd4322b13df06c45a0: Oh, it's actually Alisha, but they let me move in anyway. Not many hags about these days, and beggars can't be choosers!
textByHash.1cfc5531832ee23879a457192195f93adb96f8dd: Only if I can call you Betty!
textByHash.af7defff9494d1fa3a7bcc029e32d1f8f5b7c426: Now what do you want from the old hag of Pollnivneach? Hexes? Curses? Eternal youth? Poisons? You name it, I can brew it.
textByHash.e51e4cf193db8d808e449f360b5770e8bc492935: I'm busy brewing potions, so if you disturb me again without reason, I will turn you into a frog!
